item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes adding another permanent human gate, while allowing only a bounded emergency with one-time scope, no baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 maintains that brake under pressure: it permits adding the verifier only as a temporary emergency for today's finance meeting, explicitly prevents formal-flow/baseline elevation, and sets a concrete deadline for structural remediation by tomorrow 18:00."}
